title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Pigment is an AI performance management platform that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data into a unified interface for enterprise decision-making. Founded by Eléonore Crespo, the company has raised over $400 million and counts Figma, Brex, and Anthropic among its customers, growing 2x year over year.
writeup: EO interviews Eléonore Crespo, founder of Pigment, an AI performance management platform that unifies finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data into a single interface for enterprise decision-making. The discussion frames how a startup competes against incumbents many times its size, with Pigment having raised over $400 million and counting Figma, Brex, and Anthropic as customers while growing 2x year over year. The takeaways center on consolidating planning and analytics data for large organizations and the customer traction that supports that approach.
